description: Glinded is an AI-powered memorial and family video maker that turns user-uploaded photos and videos into finished MP4 videos with licensed music, transitions, and text overlays. It is accessed through AI chat apps such as ChatGPT rather than a standalone web editor.
summary: Glinded exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mcp-detprm6tzq-uc.a.run.app`; its site explicitly states there is no public REST API, and no GraphQL API or CLI was found.
